metadata.rationale: The article’s central claim of a real FBI leak investigation into Joe Kent is fabricated, and it is reinforced with AI-generated visuals staged to look like documentary evidence. The image-text pairing further misleads readers by presenting generic or synthetic scenes as if they confirm the existence, setting, and timeline of the alleged federal probe.
